data.title: Credo Technology Group Shares Are On The Rise Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (NASDAQ: CRDO) shares are trading higher Tuesday following the announcement of its second-quarter fiscal 2025 financial results, which significantly exceeded expectations. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: Amazon Stock Moves Higher As AWS Unveils New AI Advancements: What You Need To Know
data.description: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ:AMZN) shares are trading higher Tuesday. Amazon Web Services made a slew of announcements at its re:Invent 2024 conference, including the general availability of Trainium2, new database capabilities, Bedrock updates and new foundation models. Here's what you need to know.
